content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian came out of the ruins on the other side and sent this piece of high-grade eternal ancient gold that he had finally found to another copy body.

In this way, it can be regarded as a real hand and will not be lost.

Subsequently.

He continued into the ruins on the other side.

......

There are many dangers in the ruins on the other side, but there is no living thing.

The dangers here come from all kinds of natural dangers, and sometimes it is even a matter of luck that cannot be avoided at all.

"No wonder even the Nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level geniuses don't dare to come in, if you're unlucky, it's really easy to fall. And the pay is not proportional to the return, and those other level geniuses are naturally unwilling to take risks!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the years that followed, he would occasionally find a piece of Superior Eternal Gold, as well as some Elementary and Medium Eternal Gold, and he would bring them out anyway.

Gradually, the amount of high-grade eternal gold on his body increased.

"Yes, according to this harvest, my worth is getting richer and richer, and it is enough to buy those materials!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Ye Tian entered the depths of the ruins on the other side, and here, he was sucked in by a whirlpool.

However, there was something special about this vortex, it was not a vortex containing the power of terror strangulation, but it sucked him into a special void.

In this special void, he saw a great opportunity.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian looked at a fragment of this void, and his heart was extremely excited.

If he hadn't confessed his mistake, this should have been a fragment of the Origin of the Eternal Shore, which had completely merged with this void at this moment.

However, this Origin Fragment contains very few Origin Rules, and it is still dissipating, and it will definitely disappear in the future.

He didn't dare to move it for fear of destroying the fragment.

"Maybe you can comprehend the Origin Fragment of the Land on the Other Side of Eternity here, and it would be great if you could comprehend a trace of the Origin Rules of the Other Shore!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

This is where his replica body comprehends the rules of the Origin.

He continued to replicate a replica body to explore the ruins beyond.

In this way, one primeval epoch after another passed.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian had collected a lot of high-grade eternal ancient gold, and he was ready to trade.

......

Eternal Night Pavilion.

Ye Tian came to the branch of the Eternal Night Pavilion as the vest of the Lord of the Winter Yuan and traded with the Lord of the Yuan Pole.

Then.

The Lord of the Yuan Ji said, "The Lord of the Winter Yuan, what resources are you going to buy this time?"

"It's the same resources as last time, but this time, I need ten times the amount!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ten times the amount?" "The Lord of the Yuan Pole showed a look of embarrassment, "Lord of the Winter Yuan, the resources you want are extremely rare, and it will be ten times more at once, and it will be difficult for us in the Eternal Night Pavilion to do it!"

"If I exchange it for the Eternal Ancient Gold, will the Eternal Night Pavilion be able to do it?" Ye Tian asked.

"Superior Eternal Gold?"

The Lord of the Yuan Ji was shocked.

He didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to take out how much high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold he would be able to take, and no force would take it out for trading!

Even if Ye Tian was lucky enough to find one or two pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold, he would not be able to exchange it for ten times the amount!

Then.

Ye Tian waved his hand, and pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold hovered above his palm.

"So much fine eternal gold!"

The Lord of the Yuan Ji was shocked.

He counted it, and there were definitely a hundred or so pieces of high-grade eternal gold.

Even if it was exchanged for medium eternal ancient gold, the value of those resources that Ye Tian asked for was still above it.

However, the finest eternal gold is a priceless treasure, and naturally it cannot be counted as such.

But.

He can't do this kind of thing.

So, the Lord of the Yuan Ji said: "Lord of the Winter Yuan, I need to report this matter, you wait here for a while." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

And then he waited here for news.

Time passes slowly.

Not long after, the Lord of the Yuan Pole returned.

"Lord of the Winter Yuan, we have agreed to the Eternal Night Pavilion, you wait here for a few days, and we can gather all the resources and trade these high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold with you!" the Lord of the Yuan Pole assured.

"Okay!" Ye Tian smiled.

It seemed that the attraction of the finest eternal gold was stronger than he had imagined!

The Lord of Yuan Ji had said that the Eternal Night Pavilion did not have so many material resources, but after taking out the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, he immediately changed his words.

So, any out-of-stock is an excuse, and if you give a big enough temptation, any problem is no longer a problem.

Some days later.

The Eternal Night Pavilion finally gathered the material resources and traded with Ye Tian.

Ye Tian handed over these high-grade eternal ancient gold to the Lord of Yuanji, and the Lord of Yuanji handed these resource materials to Ye Tian and completed the transaction between them.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian happily left the Eternal Night Pavilion branch.

And not long after Ye Tian left, the Lord of Yuanji entered the depths of the branch with these high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, and met one of the deputy pavilion masters of the Eternal Night Pavilion, the Lord of Taoyang.

The Lord of Taoyang is the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm, and his strength is very strong.

"Taoyang Pavilion Master!"

The Lord of the Yuan Pole said respectfully.

"Where's the finest eternal gold?"

The Lord of Taoyang asked.

At this time, the Lord of Yuanji took out those high-grade eternal ancient gold and handed them over to the Lord of Taoyang.

"Yes, it is indeed the high-grade eternal ancient gold, that Lord of the Winter Yuan is really a fool, no matter which force it is, it is collecting the high-grade eternal ancient gold, it is not enough at all, he actually sold it to our Eternal Night Pavilion. The Lord of Taoyang said with a smile.

The Lord of the Yuan Pole was curious, "The Lord of the Taoyang Pavilion, the cultivation of the Lord of the Winter Yuan is so low, although he is a genius of the other side, his strength is not strong, where did he get so much high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold?"

The Lord of Taoyang guessed: "The Lord of Dongyuan has apprenticed to Jun Zu, and Jun Zu may really be able to get the best eternal ancient gold on his body." It is possible that Jun Zu was too good to the Lord of the Winter Yuan, and gave him the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, so that he could build a special magic circle in the future and use it to comprehend the original rules of the other side!

"It's a loser indeed!"

Recognized by the Lord of the Prime.

At this time, the Lord of Taoyang reminded: "Lord of Yuanji, this matter is kept secret, lest that Jun Ancestor come to find fault in the future, it will not be good at that time!"

"Yes!"

The Lord of the Yuan Ji answered.

Subsequently.

He left here.

And the other side.

After Ye Tian collected enough material resources, he began to cultivate the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang again.

He had enough materials this time, ten times as many materials as before, no matter how much he failed, he should have the hope of cultivating the golden body on the other side of Xuanyang.

"This time, you must practice to become a golden body on the other side of Xuanyang!"

Ye Tiandao.
